title: Google BigQuery Query Request
description: Schema for a BigQuery query request, used to execute SQL queries against BigQuery datasets.

query.description: A query string to execute, using GoogleSQL or legacy SQL syntax

maxResults.description: The maximum number of rows of data to return per page of results

defaultDataset.description: The default dataset to use for unqualified table names in the query

useLegacySql.description: Whether to use legacy SQL dialect. If false, uses GoogleSQL.

timeoutMs.description: How long to wait for the query to complete, in milliseconds

dryRun.description: If set to true, BigQuery does not run the job but instead returns statistics about the job

useQueryCache.description: Whether to look for the result in the query cache

parameterMode.description: Standard SQL only. Set to POSITIONAL to use positional query parameters or NAMED for named parameters.

DatasetReference.description: A reference to a BigQuery dataset

projectId.description: The ID of the project containing the dataset

QueryParameter.description: A query parameter for parameterized queries

name.description: The name of this parameter. Used for named parameters only.
